claim_bullets.bullet_text: Function decorator for handling null/undefined values, borrowed from Haskell's maybe monad, Ruby's andand, and CoffeeScript's existential method invocation (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.86-87).
Maybe plays nicely with instance methods (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.86-87).
The maybe decorator reduces logic of checking for nothing to a function call (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.86-87).

source_record_text: Chapter on the Maybe pattern and its implementation in JavaScript
